creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lumiwa from comment #11)
> As I am not lucky with compiled Blender I did deinstall and install package
> and it works.
> 
> Thank you.

This hardens my assumption that something/some port in your environment triggers the blender build to pull in too many libraries for unknown reason. Sorry that I could not be of more help with it.

I'll close the issue for now.
